parsed_review.summary: CP00-930 is a descriptor-only HRX bridge pack (RP30.P04.M05.S08-RP30.P04.M06.S08, 10 units, risk A) binding 2 DeniedState security-audit tail rows (M05.S08-S09) and 8 HROperations foundation implementation rows (M06.S01-S08). Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob only) confirms the implementation, validators, tests, contract projection, and evidence consistently enforce the descriptor-only boundary: no runtime, no record/permission/audit writes, no real employee/candidate/payroll/document data, no separate HRX product, payroll runtime deferred, HR-AI final judgment forbidden, and no runtime receipts. The CP930 binding (HRX_CP930_PACK_BINDING) and requirements/section rows match the manifest, baseline, and authoritative closeout-pack-plan.json (same source/hrx ledger SHAs); deliverable and micro-title distributions match exactly. createHrxCp930DeniedStateHrOperationsBridgeDescriptor plus createHrxDomainRows set all runtime/write/access/policy flags false and DeniedState/HROperations descriptor flags correctly; validators (validateHrxCp930DeniedStateHrOperationsBridgeCoverage/Descriptor and validateHrxPeopleContract) machine-enforce row-, entity-, baseline-, and attestation-level boundaries and are exercised by packages/hrx/test/model.test.js asserting zero errors. The generated contracts/hrx-people-contract.json carries validation.valid=true, latest_projection HrxCp930DeniedStateHrOperationsBridgeDescriptor, a complete no-write attestation, and all CP930 required capabilities, safety gates (incl. the 8 CP930-specific gates), and no-leak guards. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_packet.read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false), local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true (runtime opening deferred to CP00-931), and Hermes is used only for a deterministic review packet/receipt (emits_runtime_receipt=false, deterministic_only=true), not product runtime. Pack metadata correctly reports production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=in_progress pending this review; no runtime or enterprise-trust claim is made, so this CP's closeout goal is not blocked by the human/enterprise-trust authority boundary. Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte well-formed JSON), correct model (claude-opus-4-8/max/read-only), no forbidden tools, prompt within size limit. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One non-blocking P3 notes that only the 5 HRX-scoped commands are recorded in command-evidence.json (all exit 0) while the full 10-command validation ladder + Hermes control-plane gate are explicitly pending_final_validation; boundaries were verified by read-only source inspection and reported exit codes are treated as reported (not independently re-run). Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS for the descriptor-only scope; does not block pack closeout or this CP closeout goal.

findings.title: Full closeout validation ladder and Hermes control-plane gate recorded as pending_final_validation; reviewer verified boundaries by read-only source inspection
findings.details: command-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for five HRX-scoped commands (node --check on packages/hrx/src/registry.js, packages/hrx/src/validators.js, and scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs; node --test packages/hrx/test/*.test.js; npm run rp30:hrx:validate), but hermes_gate.status is 'pending' (command_ids rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, spec_requirement_validate), gate_outcome is 'pending_final_validation', and validation_summary has review_receipt_ref=null and p0_p1_p2_clear=null. construction-inspection.json verdict is PENDING and adjudication.md is pending. The broader ladder named in the prompt (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet recorded as executed. As a read-only reviewer I confirmed cross-layer consistency and closed boundaries by inspecting registry.js, validators.js, model.test.js, contracts/hrx-people-contract.json, closeout-pack-plan.json, and the pack artifacts; reported command exit codes are treated as reported evidence, not independently re-run.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping manifest status to closed and setting production_ready_flag=hrx_denied_state_hr_operations_bridge_descriptor_verified, run and record the full validation ladder plus the Hermes control-plane/spec-requirement gate green, finalize adjudication.md and construction-inspection.json, and attach this read-only review as the single valid pack-level review receipt.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-closeout snapshot state; non-blocking. The Codex closeout owner completes the final validation ladder and finalizes adjudication.md/construction-inspection.json after this read-only review; this finding does not affect the PASS verdict on the descriptor-only scope.
